summary: Iteration 17 - Unified Cricket Data Service Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). Cricbuzz scraping working as PRIMARY source (fetched 14 matches). CricketData.org API key configured as FALLBACK. Sync pipeline creates matches + auto-contests. Admin UI 'Sync IPL Live' button functional. Player view clean with zero admin traces.

cricbuzz_primary.live_cricket_returns_matches: PASS - GET /api/matches/live/cricket returns matches with source=cricbuzz
cricbuzz_primary.ipl_only_filter: PASS - GET /api/matches/live/cricket?ipl_only=true returns only IPL matches

sync_pipeline.sync_creates_matches: PASS - POST /api/matches/live/sync creates matches from Cricbuzz
sync_pipeline.sync_auto_creates_contests: PASS - Sync auto-creates contests with 1000 entry fee
sync_pipeline.second_sync_updates_existing: PASS - Second sync updates existing (no duplicates)

auto_contest_linked.synced_matches_have_contests: PASS - Matches created by sync have auto-created contests

regression_economy.new_user_gets_100000_coins: PASS - New user signup gives 100000 coins

admin_restrictions.player_cannot_sync: PASS - Regular player gets 403 on sync endpoint
admin_restrictions.player_cannot_create_match: PASS - Regular player gets 403 when creating match

frontend_ui.admin_app_loads: PASS - Admin App with gold header and Super Admin label
frontend_ui.admin_nav_tabs: PASS - Dashboard, Content, Matches, Resolve tabs visible
frontend_ui.sync_ipl_live_button: PASS - 'Sync IPL Live' button visible in Admin Matches tab
frontend_ui.sync_shows_cricbuzz_source: PASS - Sync shows 'Source: cricbuzz | Created: X | Updated: Y'
frontend_ui.matches_displayed: PASS - 27 matches displayed including IPL teams (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, SRH, RR)
frontend_ui.player_view_clean: PASS - Player view has zero admin traces
frontend_ui.player_nav_tabs: PASS - Home, My Contest, Wallet, Profile tabs visible

critical_code_review_comments: CricketDataAPI correctly configured with CRICKET_API_KEY from .env
UnifiedCricketService uses Cricbuzz as PRIMARY, CricketData.org as FALLBACK
Sync pipeline in matches.py correctly creates matches + auto-contests
_auto_create_contest() helper creates contests with 1000 entry fee
AdminMatchesTab.jsx has 'Sync IPL Live' button with data-testid='sync-live-btn'
seed_data_creation: Sync created/updated IPL matches from Cricbuzz
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested Unified Cricket Data Service. Cricbuzz scraping is PRIMARY (unlimited, no API key). CricketData.org is FALLBACK (100 calls/day, key: 32bc41b7-...). Sync endpoint POST /api/matches/live/sync creates matches from live data and auto-creates contests with 1000 entry fee. Admin UI has 'Sync IPL Live' button in Matches tab. All features working correctly.

features_verified.sync_updates_existing: VERIFIED - Second sync updates, no duplicates
